## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] Test or tooling update

## Affected Areas

- [ ] API
- [ ] UI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Database/schema
- [ ] Configuration JSON
- [ ] Reports/exports
- [ ] Security/compliance

## Testing

- [ ] PHP syntax checks passed where PHP changed
- [ ] JavaScript syntax checks passed where JS changed
- [ ] Manual UI/API smoke test completed where applicable
- [ ] Release readiness check reviewed if release/compliance files changed

## Security And Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, live credentials, private keys, logs, uploads, certificates, DB dumps, or sensitive facility/user data are included
- [ ] Server errors use friendly responses and do not expose raw database/PHP internals
- [ ] File upload/download changes include path and type validation
- [ ] SQL changes use prepared statements or validated static schema identifiers
- [ ] Documentation does not include private URLs, passwords, or real sensitive data

## Documentation

- [ ] README/GitBook/API docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if this is release-visible

## Notes For Reviewers

Add any migration steps, known risks, screenshots, or follow-up items.
